name: SvgBob

aliases.name: Settings
aliases.comment:
general settings ...

    type alias Settings =
        { fontSize : Float
        , lineWidth : Float
        , textWidth : Float
        , textHeight : Float
        , arcRadius : Float
        , strokeColor : String
        , textColor : String
        , backgroundColor : String
        , verbatim : Char
        , multilineVerbatim : Bool
        }

values.name: default
values.comment:
Default parameters to work with ...

    default =
        { fontSize = 14.0
        , lineWidth = 1.0
        , textWidth = 8.0
        , textHeight = 16.0
        , arcRadius = 4.0
        , strokeColor = "black"
        , textColor = "black"
        , backgroundColor = "white"
        , verbatim = '"'
        , multilineVerbatim = False
        }

values.name: getSvg
values.comment: Get the resulting svg and pass it into a div or whatever
values.type: SvgBob.Settings -> List.List (Svg.Attribute msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg

values.name: getSvgWith
values.comment: Get the resulting svg and pass it into a div or parse it further or do whatever ...
values.type: SvgBob.Settings -> List.List (Svg.Attribute msg) -> (String.String -> Svg.Svg msg) -> String.String -> Html.Html msg
